content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.26%, Bank Nifty +0.79%, Pharma +1.66%, IT +0.70%, PSU Banks +1.06%. India VIX down 2.74% to 17.42. Global cues constructive (US S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). Book is well-positioned with 65% deployed and unrealized gains across most names. Focus this tick: trail SLs on winners to protect gains, manage HFCL pending order, no new entries needed given book is already well-deployed and several names sit at/near 52w highs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.5%, SL already at 1035 (above entry 984, +5.2% locked). CMP 1053 vs SL 1035 = 1.7% gap, below 1.0% trail-floor risk, but SL is already trailing nicely. Per trail mandate (b): with +6.5% gain, trail level = max(984, 1053*0.98=1031.94) = 1035 — already there. HOLD effectively. Emitting MODIFY with same values is no-op; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.5% unrealized, SL at 1035 (locked +5.2% above 984 entry). Trail-floor check: CMP 1053 - SL 1035 = 18 pts = 1.7% gap, healthy buffer. Q4 beat (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, dividend Rs 8) supports continuation toward target 1110. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -1.1% within normal noise. SL 119 = -4.9% below entry, room to play. Gold recovering today +1.16%; thesis intact as portfolio hedge against geopolitical/macro tail."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain, SL already at 1715 (breakeven+0.88%). CMP 1729 - SL 1715 = 14 pts = 0.81% gap — below 1.0% trail-floor. Risk: getting stopped on normal noise. Better to HOLD current SL (no tightening) and let position breathe. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, SL 1715 already at breakeven+. CMP 1729 - SL 1715 gap = 0.81%, slightly tight but within tolerance. April cargo +15% YoY, container +17% YoY supports thesis. Promoter 2% stake-sale overhang noted but already absorbed in price. Hold to target 1800."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% small loss within tolerance; SL 206 vs CMP 207.68 = 0.81% gap. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, GNPA improved 140bps, NIM 6.2% with guided expansion — thesis intact. Banking sector +0.79% today. SL at 206 already tight; no further action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain, SL already at entry (breakeven). Per trail rule (a) with +2% triggering breakeven SL — already done. CMP 4656 - SL 4575 = 81 pts = 1.74% gap, healthy. No-op MODIFY; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, SL at entry 4575 (breakeven locked). 1.74% gap to CMP — healthy noise budget. Defence orderbook strong, new CMD positive, Q4 results upcoming mid-May. Hold for target 4875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% gain, SL already at 6950 (breakeven+0.7%). CMP 7052 - SL 6950 = 102 pts = 1.45% gap, within trail-floor. Q4 PAT +124%, EBITDA margin 34.2%, Geojit Rs 8500 target. No-op MODIFY; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1%, SL 6950 locks breakeven. 1.45% trail gap. Stellar Q4 (PAT +124%, margin +875bps), Chemours ramp, pledge released. Strong momentum to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat (-0.5%), but stock had +13% intraday spike to 870 then faded to 834. Tightening SL slightly from 820 to 825 to reduce risk after volatile session — still 1.09% below CMP 834.10 (above 1% trail-floor). |new-old|/old = 5/820 = 0.61%, above the 0.5% no-op threshold. Jefferies Rs 810 target already exceeded; orderbook Rs 13,955 cr supports continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% essentially flat. Q4 PAT +31%, NBFC disbursements +28%, AUM +16%. Stock at 52w high 369.30 today after +6.78% move. SL 358 vs CMP 369.30 = 3.06% gap, room to work. Hold for target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 812.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% small gain. Tightening SL from 805 to 812 — locks small loss-cap improvement. CMP 824.85 - new SL 812 = 12.85 pts = 1.56% gap, above 1% trail-floor. |new-old|/old = 7/805 = 0.87%, above no-op threshold. Q4 9% volume growth strong but margin pressure noted; tighter SL respects margin overhang risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "new_target": 3430.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, SL 3245 vs CMP 3278 = 1.01% gap — at trail-floor minimum. No-op MODIFY (same SL and target as stored). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 results (PAT +35% YoY, dividend Rs 33). Stock pulled back from 3315 high to 3278. SL 3245 = -1.37% from entry, within budget. Hold to target 3430."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1230.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% gain after Q4 +30% rev / +91.5% PAT FY26. Tightening SL from 1215 to 1230 (still -2.3% from entry, locks tighter loss-cap). CMP 1267.90 - new SL 1230 = 37.9 pts = 2.99% gap, well above 1% trail-floor. |new-old|/old = 15/1215 = 1.23%, above no-op threshold. Stock gapped 10% on results; sector cautious so tighter risk warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending MIS BUY 600x @ 133.50 LIMIT placed 390 min ago is still OPEN. CMP 134.17 — limit is 0.50% below CMP, may not fill in current strength. Stock has run +6.45% today on 3.1x volume but already extended. Per ORDER HYGIENE not stacking a duplicate; per timing we still have hours before 2:30 PM MIS cutoff. Letting existing order work — if not filled by ~13:30 will reassess. No new action this tick."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,

    },
    {

    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",

      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "reasoning": "+2.1%, SL at breakeven+, 1.45% trail gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 820 to 825 after volatile +13% intraday spike then fade. Still 1.09% below CMP — above trail-floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high after +6.78%. SL 358 = 3.06% from CMP — room to consolidate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 812.00,
      "reasoning": "Slight SL tightening 805→812 to respect margin pressure. 1.56% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 results, SL at 1.01% gap — exactly at trail-floor. No further tightening."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1230.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening 1215→1230 after results-day +10% gap. 2.99% gap to CMP, healthy buffer in volatile IT sector."

  "watchlist_notes": "M&M, MARICO, COFORGE all just had blockbuster results — already held. PNB, SRF, AUROPHARMA, CAMS, VEDL, GRSE: noted but not entering — book is already 65% deployed with diversified exposure across financial services (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, BANDHANBNK), defence/capgoods (HAL, TITAGARH), realty (SOBHA), chem (NAVINFLUOR), auto (M&M), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO), gold/ports. Adding more would breach cluster limits or push deployed too high. LALPATHLAB volume signal interesting but price not moving — pass for now.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +0.36% today with 11/12 positions in good shape and SLs progressively trailed. Cumulative P&L +0.55% over 17 days — modest but in the green. Key risk: sector concentration in financials (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + ABCAPITAL ≈ 25% of capital — within 35% cap but watching). Capital deployment 65% is appropriate; remaining 35% cash gives flexibility for HFCL fill or fresh entries on pullback. Today's discipline: trail SLs on winners (TITAGARH, MARICO, COFORGE), hold conviction on Q4 beats, do NOT chase 52w-high breakouts in already-extended names."
}
